name: Broiled Spicy Shark
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp Chopped fresh basil, or 1 tsp Dried basil
2 tbsp Seafood sauce or chili sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Place fish fillets in a plastic bag.
2. Add lemon juice, chopped parsley, fresh basil (or dried basil), minced garlic, seafood chili sauce, and light soy sauce to the bag.
3. Seal the top of the bag and refrigerate for at least one hour, but not longer than 8 hours.
4. Remove fish from the bag and set aside the marinade.
5. Place fish on a rack above the broiler, about 3 inches from the heat source.
6. Broil for 3-5 minutes.
7. Turn fillets over and brush the top with marinade.
8. Continue broiling an additional 5-8 minutes until the fish flakes easily or reaches your desired level of doneness.
9. Reduce the remaining marinade by boiling it until it is reduced by half, then pour over the fillets before serving.
